summary: Computer Science student at USTO-MB with strong foundations in programming, mathematics, computer systems, and software engineering principles. Built solid analytical and problem-solving skills through practical projects and core theoretical courses.

duties.title: Programming Fundamentals
duties.description: Learned and applied core programming concepts including object-oriented programming, memory management, and structured problem solving.

duties.title: Data Structures & Algorithms
duties.description: Studied and implemented classical data structures and algorithms with focus on complexity analysis and performance optimization.

duties.title: Databases & Systems
duties.description: Designed relational databases and worked with operating systems and networking fundamentals through academic labs and projects.

achievements.title: Bachelor Final Year Project
achievements.description: Developed a software system as a final-year project, applying software engineering principles from requirements analysis to implementation and testing.
achievements.impact: Demonstrated ability to design structured, maintainable systems from scratch.

achievements.title: Strong Mathematical Foundation
achievements.description: Completed advanced coursework in discrete mathematics, linear algebra, probability, and statistics.
achievements.impact: Built the mathematical foundation necessary for advanced AI and system-level reasoning.

achievements.title: Team-Based Academic Projects
achievements.description: Participated in collaborative development projects using structured documentation and version control.
achievements.impact: Developed early teamwork discipline and structured development habits.

systems.name: Bachelor Graduation Project
systems.description: Structured software application developed as part of the final-year academic requirement.
